message:
refactor(core): code quality improvements across frankenterm-core

Formatting, clippy, and idiomatic Rust improvements applied across 15
source files without changing any behavior.

Derive simplification:
- Replace manual Default impls with #[derive(Default)] + #[default]
  attribute on enum variants in AgentPaneState, AutoLayoutPolicy,
  CanonicalSeverity, OutboundSeverity, UpgradeStrategy, RoutingStrategy

Clippy fixes:
- Use &Path instead of &PathBuf for mcp::record_mcp_audit_sync parameter
- Replace match-with-single-arm-and-Err-ignore with if-let in
  SwarmScheduler::schedule_round
- Remove redundant let-binding in ObservationRuntime snapshot setup
- Simplify write_queue_depth to direct return without intermediate binding

Formatting (rustfmt):
- Reformat long lines in connector_credential_broker (error variants,
  scope matching, lease operations, audit detail formatting)
- Reformat identity_graph (AuthzDecision variants, grant operations,
  test helpers)
- Reformat connector_sdk (sha256 fold chain)
- Reformat events, policy, topology_orchestration test assertions
- Reorder ntm_parity module alphabetically in lib.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
